nasb.text: ‘The priest shall then write these curses on a scroll, and he shall wash them off into the water of bitterness.

esv.text: “Then the priest shall write these curses in a book and wash them off into the water of bitterness.

cnv.text: “祭司要把這些咒詛的話寫在卷上，又把所寫的字洗在苦水裡，

ccb.text: 祭司要把这咒诅写在书卷上，再放在苦水里把字洗掉。
